title: RuneScape API 2.2.12
changes: Update RuneScape Logo

title: RuneScape API 2.2.11
changes: Fetch jav_config via https (changed from http)

title: RuneScape API 2.2.10
changes: Launcher params handling update

title: RuneScape API 2.2.9
changes: Replaced GLX with EGL on Linux (dependency update required)

title: RuneScape API 2.2.8
changes: Fixed ping display on world select on Linux

title: RuneScape API 2.2.7
changes: Improved Linux compatibility

title: RuneScape API 2.2.6
changes: Improved Linux compatibility

title: RuneScape API 2.2.5
changes: Improved Linux compatibility

title: RuneScape API 2.2.4
changes: Modernise Launcher appearance

title: RuneScape API 2.2.3
changes: Add auto-update ability to NXT Launcher
Allow macOS to run multiple instances of RuneScape

title: RuneScape API 2.2.2
changes: Remove old registry keys correctly in installer
Don't display 'old graphics drivers' warning if we can't tell how old they are

title: RuneScape API 2.2.1
changes: Install for all users on Windows, to avoid issues with icons not appearing if installed by elevated user (and other similar problems)
Improve behaviour when closed before the client has started up properly

title: RuneScape API 2.2.0
changes: Fix crash on startup when graphics drivers are out of date

title: RuneScape API 2.1.9
changes: Make Cmd-Q and Quit menu/dock options close the launcher correctly on OSX (and Alt-F4 on linux)

title: RuneScape API 2.1.8
changes: Display prompt to update GPU drivers when they are old
Allow users to hold down 's' to select default graphics options on startup
Allow users to switch between ANGLE and OpenGL manually
Improve error reporting a bit on Windows
Fix some shutdown bugs on OSX

title: RuneScape API 2.1.7
changes: Fix keys being stuck down when switching focus on OSX

title: RuneScape API 2.1.6
changes: Intel Westmere chipsets auto-detect to run under ANGLE.
Install Visual Studio Redistributable 2015 Update 2 in installer, rather than Update 0 (and require it to be installed)

title: RuneScape API 2.1.5
changes: Launcher now remembers Window positions per instance.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.4
changes: Remove UAC checking in favour of better validation of permissions.
Improve timeouts when downloading the client (fixes error (13,28)).
Make the installer reject Windows XP < SP3.
Install DirectX 9 in more cases when it is needed.
Fix various linux graphics problems.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.3
changes: Improve error reporting slightly.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.2
changes: Some tweaks to the Ubuntu package.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.1
changes: Detect Skylake Intel HD GPUs, and force the use of ANGLE, due to various artefacts exhibited in OpenGL mode.
Allow the Windows installer to remove the cache on uninstall.

title: RuneScape API 2.1.0
changes: Fix issues with paths and filenames with non-latin characters.
Fix issues with creating cache folders in root of a drive.
Fix problems with fullscreen blocking Start Menu and Alt-Tab.
Fix some UAC problems on older versions of Windows.
Give more informative error messages when there are Launcher problems.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.9
changes: Add an x64 ANGLE build for Windows.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.8
changes: Fix crash on Mac.
Don't allow startup if the process is in an elevated UAC state on Windows.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.7
changes: Fix language selection for Dutch and Spanish computers.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.6
changes: Fix issue with going back to fullscreen the next time you load the client.
Fix issue where first visit to fullscreen would leave client in odd size.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.5
changes: Improve backwards compatibility.
Fix language and cache/settings folder configuration.
Improve progress bars.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.4
changes: Allow configuration of cache and settings folders.
Improve speed of Launcher initialization.
Added quit confirmation when logged into game.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.3
changes: Auto-detect whether ANGLE build is required, and run accordingly.
Fix detection of C++ runtime in Windows installer.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.2
changes: Make Linux version work.
Better loading progress.
Fix some focus issues.

title: RuneScape API 2.0.1
changes: Initial release.
